new_classes.label_en: blended malt Scotch whisky in containers > 2 L (CN 2208 30 49)
new_classes.label_de: Blended Malt Scotch Whisky in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 L (KN 2208 30 49)
new_classes.definition_en: Blended malt Scotch whisky presented in containers with a nominal volume greater than 2 litres. Blended malt Scotch whisky is produced by blending two or more malt Scotch whiskies distilled at different distilleries.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the four key distinguishing criteria for CN 2208 30 49: (1) Scotch whisky origin (ScotchWhiskyOriginQuality), (2) multi-distillery origin / blending of two or more malt Scotch whiskies (MultiDistilleryOriginQuality + BlendingProcess), (3) container volume > 2 L (LargeContainer, using existing TBox class), and (4) disjointness from the sibling code 22083041 (≤ 2 L containers). A small gap remains because the legal text implicitly requires each component to be a malt whisky (not grain or blended whisky), which is partially captured by the BlendedMaltWhisky parent class but not fully axiomatised at the individual-component level, hence 0.9 rather than 1.0.
